title: FederationServiceEndorsementRevocation v1
description: Signed federation-level withdrawal of one `federation-service-endorsement.v1` artifact. The revocation targets one endorsement id and repeats its federation, node, and capability coordinates so verifiers can refuse cross-scope revocation attempts before signature evaluation.

revocation_id.description: Stable id for this revocation fact.

endorsement_id.description: The exact endorsement artifact being withdrawn.

federation_id.description: Federation whose active sovereign subjects authorize this withdrawal.

node_id.description: Service node named by the revoked endorsement.

capability_id.description: Capability named by the revoked endorsement.

revoker_subject_ref.description: Sovereign participant or org subject authorized by the active federation root to withdraw the endorsement.

revoked_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the revoker issued this withdrawal.

reason.description: Optional operator-facing reason reference or terse reason code.

signatures.description: One or more Ed25519 signatures over `federation-service-endorsement-revocation.v1\x00 || canonical_json(payload_without_signatures)`. Org revocation is fail-safe: one authorized custodian may withdraw official status.
